title: Security management process
text: Covered entities and business associates shall implement policies and procedures to prevent, detect, contain, and correct security violations.

title: Workforce security
text: Workforce members shall have appropriate access to electronic protected health information (ePHI), and access shall be prevented for unauthorized persons.

title: Information access management
text: Policies and procedures shall be implemented for authorizing access to ePHI consistent with minimum necessary principles.

title: Security awareness and training
text: A security awareness and training program shall be implemented for all workforce members, including phishing and incident reporting awareness.

title: Security incident procedures
text: Policies and procedures shall address security incidents, including response, mitigation, and documentation of outcomes.

title: Facility access controls
text: Physical access to facilities and workstations containing ePHI shall be limited and safeguarded through appropriate controls.

title: Unique user identification
text: A unique name or number for identifying and tracking user identity shall be assigned for access to ePHI systems.

title: Transmission security
text: Technical security measures shall be implemented to guard against unauthorized access to ePHI transmitted over electronic communications networks.
